svg.title: AI Music Bot Generation Flow
svg.desc: Complete flow from Telegram command through content planning, generation (lyrics, metadata, visuals, audio, video), storage, and database persistence

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the Telegram bot commands')
sendPrompt('How is video created from images?')

svg.text: Blue: I/O | Purple: Planning | Teal: Data generation | Coral: Asset generation | Green: Persistence
